mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_units WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE'
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO product_capacity_slots (product_id, slot_start, capacity) VALUES
(#{productId}, #{slotStart}, #{capacity})

INSERT INTO reservation_capacity_claims (reservation_id, product_id, slot_start) VALUES
(#{reservationId}, #{productId}, #{slotStart})
